findings.title: Mock book data ships to production users on /library
findings.why_it_matters: LibraryShelves is rendered unconditionally inside Library.tsx and displays hardcoded fake titles (The Pragmatic Programmer, Deep Work, Sapiens, etc.) that are not in the user's actual library. End users on /library will see books they do not own and cannot open, which is misleading UX. The plan scopes this as a 'demonstration' shelf, but the integration wires it into the production page with no feature flag or empty-state fallback.
evidence: src/app/components/library/LibraryShelves.tsx L27-38: hardcoded mock titles and authors
ShelfSeeAllLink href='/library?sort=recent' and '/library?filter=in-progress' point to query params the page does not handle
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) gate LibraryShelves behind an env/feature flag, (b) wire to real book store data (useBookStore) with empty-state handling, or (c) explicitly mark the page as a dev-only preview. Also confirm the see-all query-string routes are supported before the link ships.

findings.title: ShelfSeeAllLink targets unimplemented query-string routes
findings.why_it_matters: The hrefs '/library?sort=recent' and '/library?filter=in-progress' are passed to ShelfSeeAllLink but Library.tsx does not appear to read 'sort' or 'filter' from useSearchParams. Clicking 'See all' will reload the same page with no observable effect, creating a dead interaction.
evidence: Library.tsx imports useSearchParams but no handler for these keys was introduced in this diff
findings.suggested_fix: Either implement sort/filter query-param handling in Library.tsx or point the links at a known-valid route (or # placeholder with onClick preventing nav until implemented).

findings.title: Plan deviation: shelf data placed in separate component, not inline in Library.tsx
findings.why_it_matters: Plan Unit 1 specifies 'Define two inline const arrays in Library.tsx' and 'Modify: src/app/pages/Library.tsx'. Implementation instead extracted a new LibraryShelves.tsx component. The deviation is arguably better (smaller Library.tsx blast radius, testable in isolation) but was not recorded in the plan's Implementation Units checkboxes or Key Technical Decisions.
evidence: Plan line 95-96: 'Modify: src/app/pages/Library.tsx' (no new file listed)
Plan line 100: 'Define two inline const arrays'
Diff adds new file LibraryShelves.tsx instead
findings.suggested_fix: Update the plan or the story's Dev Notes to capture the extraction decision so the artifact trail stays accurate.

findings.title: Unit test file path differs from plan (LibraryShelves.test.tsx vs Library.shelves.test.tsx)
findings.why_it_matters: Plan Unit 1 specifies the test file as 'src/app/pages/__tests__/Library.shelves.test.tsx'. Implementation places it at 'src/app/components/library/__tests__/LibraryShelves.test.tsx'. This is consistent with F3 (component extraction) — the test colocates with the component rather than the page. Flagged for trace completeness.
findings.suggested_fix: Update plan or story notes to reflect the colocation decision.
